project_type: TypeScript monorepo - pnpm workspaces + turborepo - 13 apps, 46 packages, 17 services
build_system: pnpm + turbo. Build order: packages first (common is root dep), then services/apps. Packages with tsconfig composite/references pattern. 8 packages lack package.json (admin, analytics, data-pipeline, developer-platform, ecosystem-bridge, gaming, i18n, performance) and are not built/tested by turbo.
test_framework: vitest - test files use .test.ts extension, co-located or in __tests__/ dirs
verification_instructions: 1. pnpm install --frozen-lockfile, 2. pnpm typecheck, 3. pnpm test, 4. pnpm build, 5. pnpm lint, 6. pnpm audit --audit-level=high, 7. grep -r 'NoOp\|placeholder\|TODO: replace' packages/ services/ apps/ --include='*.ts' | wc -l (must be <= 5)
snapshot_or_generated_files: packages/common/dist/ and other dist/ folders are build outputs, NOT checked in. tsconfig composite references require build before typecheck of dependents.
setup_instructions: pnpm install --frozen-lockfile (installs all deps). Node 22 required (.nvmrc). No special env setup needed for build/test.
environment_constraints: OPEN_INTERNET - full access. No Docker needed for validation. All gates pass host-based. Current state: all 6 gates pass (install, typecheck, test, build, lint, audit_high). NoOp/placeholder count is 44 (target: <=5).
contribution_requirements: Phase 18 rules: 1) Truth before progress, 2) No fake completion signals, 3) Every replaced stub gets a deletion, 4) Small reviewable diffs <=500 LOC, 5) Architecture decision must be documented. Hard gate: NoOp/placeholder/TODO-replace count <=5.
key_patterns: Packages use barrel exports from src/index.ts. Services are BullMQ workers or health-only stubs. Apps use Next.js app router (quantai/quantchat/quantmail) or pages-based (quantedits/quantmax/quantneon/quantube/quantads/quantsync). Mock data in pages uses `const mockX = [...]` or `Array.from({length: N}, ...)` patterns.
directory_structure: Root: apps/ (13 Next.js/React apps), packages/ (46 shared libs, 8 without package.json), services/ (17 backend services). .agents/ for task state. .github/workflows/ for CI.
